map.name: F_family_d4_cor53_pilot

formula_display.P: A*B with A=1+xy, B=A^2 z + y^2(4+3xy)
formula_display.note: Q,R are seed components; full expanded sparse form not required for row identity

map.construction: Ulam Cor 5.3 recipe for d=4: N=2, psi_2(T)=c(4T+1), other psi_j=0; F_psi=(P,Q_psi,R_psi) on seed (P,Q,R).

placeholders.poisson_lift_Phi: G2 TODO: Phi_4(q,p)=(F_psi(q), J^{-T} p); not proved in this row
placeholders.weyl_formula: G3 TODO: Weyl lift of F_psi; not proved in this row

composition_notes: Instance of Cor 5.3 family at d=4. Not a composite of atlas rows. Further d via same recipe not bulk-registered.
non_claims: Pilot algebraic certification only — not full independent re-proof of Thm 5.2 for arbitrary psi
mu=4 justified at fiber-polynomial degree + preprint; not full function-field re-proof in CAS
Does not claim forall d machine certification
Does not claim factory-false slogan as Quantyra theorem
